---
title: "Academic Coursework"
toc: false
---

**Graduate Level**

MET-AD571: Business Analytics Foundations

MET-AD632: Financial Concepts

MET-AD715: Quantitative and Qualitative Decision Making

MET-AD654: Marketing Analytics

MET-AD599: Python & SQL Business Analytics

MET-AD688: Cloud Analytics for Business

**Undergraduate Level**

QST-MO420: People Analytics

QST-MK442: Digital Marketing Analytics

QST-BA305: Business Decision Making with Data

QST-IS465: Managing Data Resources

---
